message:
fix(session): reject dangling parent references in session store integrity validation

Add validate_parent_graph_links() to detect frames whose parent_entry_id
points to a non-existent entry in the store. Previously, only cycles and
duplicates were checked — a frame referencing parent_id="Z" when no "Z"
entry exists would pass validation silently. This could let corrupted
stores report Migrated status while read_active_path() silently
truncates history at the dangling link.

The new check runs before the existing acyclic validation so that
missing-parent errors surface before the more expensive DFS cycle
detection.

New test: validate_integrity_rejects_missing_parent_reference manually
corrupts a segment to reference parent "Z" and asserts the integrity
check fails with "missing parent entry detected".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
